text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello. I'm here to clarify any<n>questions you might
have about the<n>Grand Concert and how to train for
it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: So, do you have any questions for<n>me?
choice_data_list: Yes, I'd like to know more.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What would you like to know about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm still unclear about...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Right, the Grand Concert.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It was an event put together by the<n>students
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, it faded away once the<n>URA
normalized winning concerts, and<n>now not many
people know about it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Which is why you'll need to get the<n>word out by
holding promo concerts.<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You'll hold a total of four of these,<n>and each
concert's reception will be<n>determined by how
many new songs<n>are performed.
color_text_info_list: determined by how many new songs are performed.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
A successful concert will be a boon to<n>the
students' growth.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you learn as many new<n>songs as
possible to ensure eventual<n>success at the Grand
Concert.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And don't forget, your trainee will<n>also be racing in
the Twinkle Series<n>while you're preparing for all
those<n>performances.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you're not careful in meeting your<n>goals, her
career may be over before<n>you ever get to the
Grand Concert!
color_text_info_list: her career may be over before you ever get to the Grand Concert!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Is there anything else you'd like to<n>know?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, performance points.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
After a successful training session,<n>you'll gain
one of five types of<n>performance points.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Different training types will give you<n>different
types of performance points<n>each time, so be sure
to check your<n>options.
color_text_info_list: give you different types of performance points each time

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The amount of points you earn also<n>depends on
the level of the training<n>and the number of
Umamusume you<n>train with.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Friendship Training will even give you<n>two types
of performance points at<n>once!
color_text_info_list: give you two types of performance points at once

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Certain events will also give you<n>performance
points. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You'll need points to learn songs and<n>concert
techniques, so earn as many<n>as possible!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Is there anything else you'd like to<n>know?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah, lessons.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Lessons are where your trainee will<n>learn new
songs and concert<n>techniques with the
performance<n>points you've earned.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
After learning a new song or concert<n>technique,
you'll also acquire a<n>Mastery Bonus. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
These bonuses can boost abilities,<n>recover
Energy, improve training<n>effectiveness, and more!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In short, lessons offer nothing but<n>benefits for
your trainee, so make<n>good use of them. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Learning a new song will additionally<n>grant you a
Concert Bonus.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: These bonuses will provide beneficialeffects after your next promoconcert.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
They offer different benefits from<n>Mastery
Bonuses, so keep an eye<n>out for both types. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But keep in mind that you can only<n>learn so many
songs in between<n>concerts!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If a lesson catches your eye but you<n>don't have
enough performance<n>points, you can schedule it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Scheduling a lesson will let you see<n>which
performance points you need<n>while training.
Convenient, isn't it? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's all you need to know about<n>lessons. Is
there anything else you'd<n>like to know?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Okay. ♪ I've prepared a summary of<n>everything
you need to know, just in<n>case.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If you ever need a refresher, just tap<n>the "i"
button in the top left of the<n>screen.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's all from me. Good<n>luck—I'll be rooting
for you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Okay, well, good luck—I'll be rooting<n>for you!
